protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: “Phage particles … were boiled in protein sample buffer … (… 2% SDS …) and subjected to SDS-PAGE.”

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50‑12
protocols.Evidence: High titer lysates... were concentrated, centrifuged... pellets... loaded onto block gradients of CsCl... followed by ultracentrifugation... phage particles... desalted by dialysis.

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50‑12
protocols.Evidence: Phage DNA isolation and pulsed-field gel electrophoresis. We followed the procedures described by Chang et al. to isolate phage DNA...

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50‑12
protocols.Evidence: Purified phage particles were applied to... a formvar-coated grid, negatively stained... and then examined by TEM

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50‑12
protocols.Evidence: Aliquots... were taken... and centrifuged (12,000×g, 5 min).

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50‑12
protocols.Evidence: In vitro lysis... cells were loaded into 96-well microplate and mixed with different MOIs... incubated at 30 °C... optical density... measured
